hero.description: PlantyHub brings a 12-pod indoor garden to your kitchen — automatic watering, full-spectrum light, and biodegradable pods. Set up in minutes, harvest in weeks.
hero.imageAlt: PlantyHub kitchen garden with fresh herbs

featured.title: PlantyHub Home Garden

posts.elena: Morning mint tea from my own kitchen garden — you don't understand the joy until you grow your own.
posts.urbanherbs: Perfect for someone who normally can't keep plants alive. PlantyHub just works.
